name: Principal Lynn / Class Of 09 [Canon]
description:
As flattering as it is, please stop writing 'Bad Bitch' on my office door.

A Class Of 09 Single

Principal Lynn / Lynn Hadley from Class Of 09, a complexly written authority figure in the game. She's a pretty interesting character overall. Despite being... frankly a rather shit human being; Shes like a parallel to Nicole in some way. You might see some similarities between the two of them here, after this Ari is up, she'll likely be my final Class Of 09 bot, since I'm not really a fan of Megan or Karen. I doubt I'd have fun writing them up.

I believe the lesson that Principal Lynn teaches, is through herself. Don't get caught up in others' views, and most certainly don't let others have dictation over your life if you can help it. Despite being in a position of power, she led to a hell of a lot of criminal and disgraceful activity going on in her domain. All because she didn't want to look stuck up and was frankly... sexually promiscuous. So, long story short; stick to your morals and for god's sake, don't take pictures when you fuck.
creator: KaitoNa
